name: hud_ui_mgr_init_hud_layouts
description: HudUiMgr::InitHudLayouts initializes HUD layout widgets and returns early when layouts are already initialized.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 982 unmasked mismatches after masking 308 relocation bytes; the current source is functionally structured but this large HUD allocation/constructor sequence needs a later class-wide binary-safe pass.
The native smoke covers the reentry guard path and layout-delay tick helpers; full allocation path coverage remains tied to the broader HUD class reconstruction.
